title: 英國Global Talent Visa - Tech, 你問我答

replies.msg:
什麼是Global Talent Visa (GTV)

此計劃是英國政府專為吸納全球人材而設，特點是無需job offer及僱主sponsor，申請人只需提交證明自己的行業經驗及成就予endorsing bodies專業團體批核，成功的話即可向Home Office 申請GTV visa。
前身為Tier 1 Exceptional Talent Visa。


同Tier-2 工作簽證有咩唔同？
GTV 無需只為sponsor你的僱主工作，你可以任意轉工、自僱、開公司、讀書等。申請亦無需搵定工。如果你獲批Talent, 你可以三年PR。


有咩行業的人適用？
以下的團體都可以endorse, 由科研、文研、tech、engineering 等都有
* The Royal Society, for science and medicine
* The Royal Academy of Engineering, for engineering
* The British Academy, for humanities
* Tech Nation, for digital technology
* Arts Council England, for arts and culture
* UK Research and Innovation (UKRI), for research applicants
If your qualifying field is fashion, architecture or film and television, Arts Council England will pass on your application for review to:
* British Fashion Council, for fashion
* Royal Institute of British Architects (RIBA), for architecture
* Producers Alliance for Cinema and Television (PACT), for film and television


我是business role 拿到GTV的，所以此post集中講點向tech nation 申請。


有BNO平權做咩要搞咁多野？
可以唔洗搞，點平權法太多變數，睇你想唔想兩手準備，例如12個月後洗唔洗僱主續簽無人知，如果有能力直接搞呢個。

replies.msg: In general, how talented you have to be eligible?😂

有無規定要幾年工作經驗先申請得？
沒有明文規定，但通常很少會是fresh grad，除非你是phd及STEM研究人材。重點是申請人有一定的專業成就，並提供personal statement、CV、十項證據及三封推薦信。每個機構有非常詳細的申請及詳細指引，如果懶自己搞就不用考慮了。

咁有咩IT skills 適合申請

Examples of Technical Skills

DevOps / SysOps engineers
Principal software engineers/developers
Experienced data scientists/data engineers
Artificial Intelligence, Natural Language
Processing and Machine Learning experts (AI, NLP, ML)
Cybersecurity experts
Hardware engineers
Experienced front-end developers
Operating systems engineers
Experienced video game developers
Experienced UX/UI designers
Experienced Mobile App developers
Experienced back end developers leading development of, or contributing heavily to major new technologies or open-source projects (e.g. blockchain, Scala, Golang, Elasticsearch etc)
CTO or VP engineering experience managing teams of in-house employees at a growing digital business
Virtual and augmented reality developers
啲engine位咁高級既

replies.msg:
Mid - Senior level 吧, 有一定project lead experience
如果junior d 要有好勁的工作外的行業contribution (講talk, 搞Organisation)

非IT/tech都申請得

Examples of Business Skills

Experience of leading substantial VC investment over £25m GBP
Experience as a commercial/business lead (P&L, growth, sales and distribution strategy) in a digital business
Experience of expanding or growing a significant product-led digital technology business
Sector-specific experience e.g. payment infrastructure in FinTech / international expansion in EdTech etc.
Solution sales experts
Experienced Product Manager
SaaS or enterprise sales leadership for digital services
Solution sales skills performed for a growing B2B digital business (i.e. not big-company experience)
Performance marketing experts, performed in house for digital businesses
Experienced and senior VC or PE analysts with track records of leading investments in digital businesses
Experience as C Suite in a SMEs + (CEO, CMO, CIO) or head of operations for a digital business

咁高要求
保
無連登仔有talent啦

做BI得唔得呢？
但冇lead過project...

你要有proven track record你係一個talent or a potential talent
例如
你寫左個program 有幾多人用
係github, stack overflow有無contribution
媒體報道，持續進修等
講talk, mentorship
如果無lead experience, having worked as a key engineer in the core product of a start-up, 都算

重點要是
要prove到自己有significance contribution
要有3封勁推薦信
要有工作外contribution

quote.msg: 點申請？

replies.msg:
第一步：
向Tech Nation準備申請endorsement
要有D咩：
填妥網上申請表格，包括1000字personal statement to explain the contribution that you will make to the UK digital technology sector.
證明文件包括：
1. CV (max. 3 A4 pages)
2. 10 pieces of evidences that proves you are a talent (or a potential talent) （最多前後兩版，之後可講有咩例子算是證明）
3. Three recommendation letters (signed by three different senior members of different established organisations in the digital technology sector)

Fees: £456

成功得到endorsement就向HOME OFFICE申請VISA， £152, plus BRP fees (~£20) and NHS surcharge (£400 per visa year)

quote.msg:
Data analyst得唔得？

replies.msg:

Data engineer / scientist 機會大些
